description_long: This is a dark-colored bottle with a matte black body and a wide, red band encircling its midsection. The red band features a stylized, weathered graphic in gray, which appears to depict two hands reaching toward each other, reminiscent of Michelangelo's 'Creation of Adam.' The bottle has a contoured, hourglass shape, making it ergonomic to hold. At the top, a red and white crown-style bottle cap is positioned above the neck, suggesting it is removable. The surface of the bottle and the band show signs of wear, with visible scuffs and scratches, giving it a rugged, urban look. The bottle appears solid and opaque, with no visible contents inside.
description: A matte black bottle with a red, weathered band featuring a graphic of two hands reaching toward each other, topped with a red and white crown cap.
description_view_0: Front view showing the red band with a partial hand graphic and the bottle cap above the neck.
description_view_1: Side view displaying the red band wrapping around the bottle, with the graphic less visible and more of the band’s curve exposed.
description_view_2: Rear view with the red band and a faint, partial graphic, mostly showing the band’s continuous wrap.
description_view_3: Opposite front view clearly showing the two hands on the red band almost touching, with the bottle cap above.
attribute_label_or_branding: A stylized gray graphic of two hands reaching toward each other on a red band; no text or explicit branding visible.
attribute_damage_or_deformation: Visible scuffs and scratches on the red band, giving a worn appearance.
